history.content: Ha, poor plus seven equals... still poor, but with better math skills! Ask me a robot thing, my circuits are better at that.
I'm PiCar, your friendly little rolling buddy! Right now I've got a couple bottles in my sights and clear road ahead.
Doing great, thanks for asking - battery's sitting pretty at 8.3 volts, so I've got plenty of juice in me today. Nobody's in front of my cameras right now though, kinda quiet out here.
